parameters.query:
INSERT INTO services
  (title, description, image, price, prestataire_id, category_id, status)
VALUES
  (
    '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.description ? ("'" + $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'") : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.image ? ("'" + $json.image.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'") : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.price }},
    {{ $json.prestataire_id }},
    {{ $json.category_id || 'NULL' }},
    'EN_ATTENTE'
  );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS service_id;
